reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.rtings.com and search for the best TV recommendations. List EVERY TV that RTINGS recommends. For each product get: full product name, category it's recommended for, detailed pros with specific scores/measurements, detailed cons with specific flaws.

Search for 'site:consumerreports.com best TV 2025 2026' and also search for 'Consumer Reports best TV' to find their current recommendations. Extract every TV from their list. For each product get: full name, ranking position or category, detailed pros with specific scores/measurements, detailed cons with specific flaws.

Search for 'site:cnet.com best TV 2025 2026' and also search for 'CNET best TV' to find their current recommendations. Extract every TV from their list. For each product get: full name, ranking position or category, detailed pros with specific scores/measurements, detailed cons with specific flaws.
